pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 11 and verifier.py line 56 both reference this path

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real GCompris educational software (installed from Ubuntu packages gcompris-qt) to run a tangram puzzle activity. The expected screenshot output is saved to /tmp/tangram_final.png. The activity is categorized under 'puzzle' section. The actual activity display name in GCompris is 'The tangram puzzle game', not simply 'tangram' as claimed. No fixed dataset is used; the task is dynamic and based on the GCompris application itself, making the data non-synthetic (from real, publicly available open-source software).
